day08_single_agent.description: Day 08 style: embed → retrieve_top3 → extractive_synthesis. Không có supervisor, routing, MCP tools, HITL.

analysis.multi_hop_accuracy: Day08: 0/0 (N/A) | Day09: xem supervisor_route trong traces (cross-doc queries → policy_tool_worker)
analysis.routing_visibility: Day09: mỗi câu có supervisor_route + route_reason → explainable. Day08: tất cả đi thẳng retrieval, không có routing.
analysis.mcp_tools: Day08: 0 MCP calls. Day09: 3/15 (20%) câu dùng MCP tools.
analysis.hitl: Day08: không có HITL. Day09: 1/15 (6%) câu trigger human review.
analysis.debuggability: Day09: test từng worker độc lập được, trace đầy đủ workers_called + mcp_tools_used. Day08: monolithic, khó isolate lỗi.
